intended_use: BriefCase is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of non-enhanced head CT images. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and tra
intended_use_full: BriefCase is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of non-enhanced head CT images. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and trained radiologists in workflow triage by flagging and communication of suspected positive findings of pathologies in head CT images, namely Intracranial Hemorrhage (ICH).
ground_truth: Ground truth determination of ICH presence/absence in the 198 cases (method not explicitly specified in document)
other_metrics: Time-to-notification: 4.46 minutes (95% CI 4.10-4.83); Standard of care time-to-exam-open: 72.58 minutes (95% CI 45.02-100.14); Mean time difference: 68.11 minutes (95% CI 40.50-95.72, p<0.0001)
